calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-02-2024 Vacated

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-01-2023 Set For Trial On Oct-28-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT BRITTINI FLATLEY's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Adam Goodman's unopposed pro hac vice application is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admission To Defendant And Cross-Complainant Admitted And Request For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-21-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: RE: CROSS DEFENDANT ETNH FOUNDATION,, SARA TRUEBRIDGE's Motion To Deem Requests For Admission To Defendant And Cross-Complainant Admitted And Request For Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF AND CROSS-DEFENDANT ETNH FOUNDATION'S (HEREAFTER EITHER "PLAINTIFF" OR "ETNH") MOTION TO DEEM REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION TO DEFENDANT AND CROSS-COMPLAINANT BRITTINI FLATLEY (HEREAFTER EITHER "DEFENDANT" OR "FLATLY" IS DENIED AS FOLLOWS:
(1) FLATLY'S PRELIMINARY STATEMENT AND ALL OBJECTIONS TO ETNH'S REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION NOS 1 - 23 ARE OVERRULED.
(2) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, FLATLY MUST SERVE ETNH WITHOUT OBJECTION VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES EITHER ADMITTING, DENYING OF STATING AN INABILITY TO EITHER ADMIT OR DENY ANY PART OF THE REQUEST NOS 1 - 23.
(3) WITHIN FIFTEEN (15) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER FLATLY MUST DELIVER TO ETNH WITHOUT OBJECTION VERIFIED CODE COMPLIANT RESPONSES TO ETNH'S FORM INTERROGATORY 17.1 AS TO ANY REQUEST FOR ADMISSION WHERE HER RESPONSE IS OTHER THAN AN UNQUALIFIED ADMISSION.
(4) THE COURT WILL IMPOSE A MONETARY SANCTION AGAINST FLATLY AND HER ATTORNEYS IN THE AMOUNT OF THREE THOUSAND DOLLARS ($3,000.00) PAYABLE TO ETNH AND ITS ATTORNEY WITHIN TEN (10) CALENDAR DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.

COUNSEL FOR ETNH SHOULD PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER CONSISTENT WITH THIS TENTATIVE RULING, SUBMIT A COPY TO COUNSEL FOR FLATLY AND DELIVER TO COPY IN WORDFORM TO THE COURT (rennepar85@gmail.com) IN ADVANCE OF THE HEARING ON NOVEMBER 21, 2023

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported (302/RBU)
